title: One Mace
description: This plugin allows one or more players on the server to craft the mace, with a special announcement.
body:
# **One Mace**

**This plugin limits the number of maces that can be crafted on the server, with live tracking, custom recipes, and container restrictions all managed through an in-game GUI.**

---

## **⭐ Core Features**

*   **Configurable Crafting Limit:** Choose exactly how many Maces can be crafted (up to 7). Once the limit is reached, all Mace recipes are automatically removed server-wide.
*   **Full In-Game GUI Control:** Use the `/om settings` command to access a menu where you can fully configure the plugin without touching a file:
    *   **Crafting Limit:** Change the server's maximum allowed Maces.
    *   **Custom Recipes:** Edit the crafting recipe for each individual Mace.
    *   **Mace Attributes:** Toggle specific traits like Fire Immunity or Enchantability per Mace.
    *   **Container Restrictions:** Block Maces from being stored in Ender Chests, Shulker Boxes, Chests and way more.
    *   **Master Switch:** Instantly enable or disable the entire plugin.
    *   **Cosmetic Settings:** Toggle whether to reveal the crafter's real name in announcements, and choose whether to display a Mace's attributes (Enchantable/Fire Immune) in its item lore.
*   **Live Mace Tracking:** You can use the locate command to find the exact coordinates, player inventory, or container currently holding each crafted Mace.
*   **Epic Animated Announcement:** Triggers a stunning, server-wide title animation and chat broadcast to announce the moment a Mace has been crafted.

---

## **📺 See It In Action**

This video showcases the server-wide animated announcement when the Mace is crafted:

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/tE_BSvpkvrs" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

---

## **⌨️ Commands & Permissions**

The main command is **/onemace** (alias: **/om**).

*   **/om settings**
    *   Opens the main settings and editing menu.
    *   **Permission:** `onemace.command.settings`

*   **/om locate**
    *   Locates all crafted maces on the server.
    *   **Permission:** `onemace.command.locate`

*   **/om reset [confirm]**
    *   Wipes all mace data and resets the plugin.
    *   **Permission:** `onemace.command.reset`

*   **/om reload**
    *   Reloads the plugin's configuration files.
    *   **Permission:** `onemace.command.reload`

*   **Admin Permission:**
    *   `onemace.*` or `onemace.admin` - Grants access to all plugin commands. (Defaults to OP).

---

## **💡 Suggestions & Feedback**
